name: Synup Social vs. MavSocial
hero_summary: Love using a content-first social media manager? Then you *need* to upgrade to Synup Social. Although MavSocial is great for keeping your feed on fleek, its capabilities only touch the surface. Built for optimizing and creating content, Synup Social will have you hitting your engagement goals in no time. And with an intuitive post creator, you can optimize your content using data-backed insights. Neat!
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_summary: Ready to create more posts in less time? It’s possible with Synup Social. With the same beloved post recycler, custom reporting, and content suggestions, Synup ups the ante with advanced, post-by-post analytics and a smart, AI-powered post generator. Get ready to fill your content calendar in minutes!
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: Post creation is our specialty. Revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more - all in your distinct brand voice. Inspire your team with ideas that will drive engagement and delight your audience. Say goodbye to writers’ block!
section_2_slider_2_summary: From trend and competitor research to writing posts, content creation takes time. We put your post creation in the fast lane, helping you revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more - all in your distinct brand voice. While MavSocial provides no content creation support, we inspire your top-performing posts. With trend forecasting, competitor tracking, and post analytics, your posts will smash your engagement goals!
section_2_slider_3_heading: Collaboration is the name of the game
section_2_step_3_summary: MavSocial’s approval workflow is limited in scope - and sometimes means putting extra meetings on the calendar to discuss changes.Synup Social enables content teams to manage all of their content with a collaborative approval workflow. Supervisors and clients can easily approve posts and provide feedback directly on the platform!
section_2_slider_4_summary: With Synup Social, you can schedule posts for multiple locations or multiple brands simultaneously. MavSocial provides no support for multi-brand management, making Synup Social the clear choice for agencies and resellers managing multiple brands. It’s simple for brands with multiple locations to manage their social profiles for tens to thousands of locations - all from one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over MavSocial?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: MavSocial and Synup Social are both renowned for their content-driven approach to social media management. While they’re both solid tools when it comes to content creation, post optimization, and analytics, Synup takes the cake. With more features and a support team that will lay their lives on the line for you, you’ll be mad you didn’t find a MavSocial alternative sooner. Here’s an in-depth look:
